candidate_a.title: VendorOrbit
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Inconsistency in ingredient pricing across multiple wholesalers
candidate_a.core_concept: Unified price comparison dashboard for specific high-volume ingredients.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A simple web-based spreadsheet interface where users manually input prices from 2-3 vendors to see a side-by-side comparison.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A static web page with a form for manual entry and a table view for comparison. | Define 3 core ingredients (flour, sugar, dairy); Build a simple HTML/JS form for manual price entry; Implement a basic table view that highlights the lowest price per item

candidate_b.title: VendorOrbit
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Inconsistency in ingredient pricing across multiple wholesalers
candidate_b.core_concept: Aggregated daily procurement ledger with alert system
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Manual import of vendor PDFs converted to a unified dashboard showing cost fluctuations
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A tool that parses CSV or PDF invoices and displays a simplified price comparison table for flour, sugar, and dairy

candidate_a.title: Fresh-Roast Micro-batch Aggregator
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Difficulty in tracking distinct flavor profiles from independent local roasters without shipping bloat
candidate_a.core_concept: Curated coffee subscription focused strictly on 48-hour roast freshness.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A hyper-local subscription service that partners with three roasters to deliver beans roasted within 48 hours via a manual, fixed-route courier model.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A manual subscription list for 20 local users, with a single courier picking up and delivering on a set day. | Secure commitment from 3 local roasters for specific roast days.; Recruit 20 local subscribers via email/social.; Execute 4 weekly delivery cycles using a manual spreadsheet for routing.

candidate_b.title: Fresh-Roast Micro-batch Aggregator
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Difficulty in tracking distinct flavor profiles from independent local roasters without shipping bloat
candidate_b.core_concept: Curated selection service focusing solely on roasting dates within 48 hours
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Middleware logistics platform connecting regional small-scale roasters to single-cup subscribers
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Testing logistical feasibility with three local roasters using a custom delivery route scheduler

candidate_a.title: Inter-App Knowledge Scavenger
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Duplicate information creation where project context is scattered between messenger apps and whiteboard collaboration tools.
candidate_a.core_concept: Bi-directional linkage building between synchronous communications and asynchronous document stores through contextual tagging.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Running as an background process, the agent creates summary snippets of messenger discussions, placing them into current projects in management folders.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Connecting one real-time chat platform specifically to one project management ticketing system.

candidate_b.title: Inter-App Knowledge Scavenger
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Duplicate information creation where project context is scattered between messenger apps and whiteboard collaboration tools.
candidate_b.core_concept: Summarizing chat discussions and linking them to project management tickets.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A tool that allows users to select chat messages and push them as comments to a project management ticket.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A Slack/Teams bot that lets users click a 'save to ticket' button on a message. | Build chat bot integration; Implement ticket API connection; Create 'save' action; Test with one PM tool

candidate_a.title: Corporate Sensory Break Kits
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Need to boost morale during remote workforce burnout via shared, multi-sensory team rituals
candidate_a.core_concept: Shared, multi-sensory team coffee rituals for remote workers.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A kit containing curated coffee samples and a guided tasting card for remote teams to use during a video call.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Host 3 virtual tasting events for teams using physical kits sent by mail. | Assemble 3 sets of tasting kits.; Coordinate with 3 team leads for virtual events.; Conduct the events and collect feedback.

candidate_b.title: Corporate Sensory Break Kits
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Need to boost morale during remote workforce burnout via shared, multi-sensory team rituals
candidate_b.core_concept: Curated monthly discovery experience delivered at home, connecting employees virtually through live tasting calibration sessions
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Coordinating timed arrival of proprietary cupping samples so team units begin simultaneous tasting led by remote sensors or virtual coaching
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Hosting three virtual events involving manual sensory tracking surveys provided at delivery via paper form

candidate_a.title: Recruitment Sourcing Filter
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Identifying stealth, passive candidate sentiment signals before they actively enter the job market.
candidate_a.core_concept: Ranking candidates based on public technical content production.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A tool that scrapes public contribution histories and grades them based on a predefined rubric.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A script that takes a GitHub/StackOverflow profile and outputs a score based on frequency and complexity of contributions. | Define scoring rubric; Build scraper for one platform; Implement scoring logic; Create simple report

candidate_b.title: Recruitment Sourcing Filter
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Identifying stealth, passive candidate sentiment signals before they actively enter the job market.
candidate_b.core_concept: Autonomous social reading and contribution analysis, focused solely on long-form public content authored by candidates.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Ranking candidate 'mindshare' via analysis of high-depth technical content production on community forums as opposed to resumes.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Limited to scraping and grading public contribution histories for one job description on one coding community forum.
